search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20062` direction="inbound" threat_list_name="*" | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | stats count

`netflow_search_rule_20062` direction="outbound" threat_list_name="*" | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | stats count

`netflow_search_rule_20062` threat_list_name="*" | fillnull value=0 bytes_out | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `dedup_timechart_events` | bucket _time $span_token$ | fillnull value="" threat_list_name, app_id | fillnull value="unknown" app_name username | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, src_host)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, dest_host)` | strcat src_ip_string " - " dest_ip_string host_pair | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | stats sum(bytes) as sumbytes by host_pair,app_port,transport,exp_ip_name,direction,threat_list_name,app_id,app_name,username,_time | eval summbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$*1000000) | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, app_port)` | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ sum(summbits) by direction useother="f"

`netflow_search_rule_20062` threat_list_name="*" | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | fillnull value="Unknown" reputation | search transport="$protocol_name$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | eval ip=if(direction="inbound",src_ip,dest_ip) | eval attacker = ip . " - " . reputation . " (". direction . ")" | iplocation ip | geostats count by attacker

`netflow_search_rule_20062` threat_list_name="*" | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport src_vm_name dest_vm_name src_cc dest_cc | search transport="$protocol_name$" | fillnull value=0 bytes_out packets_out | fillnull value="Unknown" reputation | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | eval attacker_ip = if(direction=="inbound",src_ip,dest_ip) | eval attacker_host = if(direction=="inbound",src_host,dest_host) | eval attacker_vm = if(direction=="inbound",src_vm_name,dest_vm_name) | eval attacker_port = if(direction=="inbound",src_port,dest_port) | eval attacker_cc = if(direction=="inbound",src_cc,dest_cc) | eval victim_ip = if(direction=="outbound",src_ip,dest_ip) | eval victim_host = if(direction=="outbound",src_host,dest_host) | eval victim_vm = if(direction=="outbound",src_vm_name,dest_vm_name) | eval victim_port = if(direction=="outbound",src_port,dest_port) | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | eval packets = packets_in + packets_out | stats sum(bytes) as sum_bytes sum(packets) as sum_packets sum(flow_count) as "Flow Count" avg(duration) as avg_duration by nfo_hostname exp_ip attacker_ip attacker_port attacker_host attacker_vm attacker_cc victim_ip victim_port victim_host victim_vm threat_list_name reputation transport flow_smpl_id | eval megabytes = sum_bytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - megabytes | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, megabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, sum_packets)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Duration, avg_duration,2)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval attacker_host=if(attacker_vm=="",attacker_host,attacker_host." (".attacker_vm.")") | eval victim_host=if(victim_vm=="",victim_host,victim_host." (".victim_vm.")") | `format_port_column(attacker_port, attacker_port)` | `format_port_column(victim_port, victim_port)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name attacker_ip attacker_host attacker_port victim_ip victim_host victim_port threat_list_name reputation transport attacker_cc "Total Traffic MB" "Total Packets" "Flow Count" "Avg Duration" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename transport as "Protocol" | rename attacker_ip as "Attacker IP" | rename attacker_port as "Attacker port" | rename attacker_host as "Attacker host (VM)" | rename attacker_cc as "Country" | rename victim_ip as "Victim IP" | rename victim_port as "Victim port" | rename victim_host as "Victim host (VM)" | rename threat_list_name as "Threat List" | rename reputation as "Reputation"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
